design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Slay the Spire through its core roguelike loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Intent system telegraphs enemy actions; status and block layers define turn planning.
constraints: Three energy per turn limits plays
Path choices trade elites vs rest vs shops
gdd_outline.core_loop: Pick paths on the act map, fight turn-based card battles, add or remove cards from the deck, spend gold at shops, and defeat the act boss to advance with persistent relic carry-over.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Gold funds shop removals and purchases; potions and cards compete for limited funds.
gdd_outline.overview: Slay the Spire is a roguelike deckbuilder where players route through procedural acts, drafting cards and relics to defeat elites and bosses within a per-turn energy budget.
player_goals: Build a synergistic deck for the run
Unlock cards and relics across accounts
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Relics modify rules permanently within a run; card rewards appear after most combats.

mechanics.expression: In Slay the Spire, players build a run-specific deck by adding and removing cards between encounters.
mechanics.map_notes: In Slay the Spire, players build a run-specific deck by adding and removing cards between encounters.

mechanics.expression: In Slay the Spire, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.
mechanics.map_notes: In Slay the Spire, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.

mechanics.expression: In Slay the Spire, players draw from a deck into a limited hand and discard or exhaust cards each turn.
mechanics.map_notes: In Slay the Spire, players draw from a deck into a limited hand and discard or exhaust cards each turn.

mechanics.expression: In Slay the Spire, passive relics or artifacts modify rules and combo with deck or combat systems.
mechanics.map_notes: In Slay the Spire, passive relics or artifacts modify rules and combo with deck or combat systems.

mechanics.expression: In Slay the Spire, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.map_notes: In Slay the Spire, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

narrative.core_loop: Choose paths on the act map, fight turn-based card battles, acquire cards and relics, spend gold at shops, and defeat an act boss to advance.
narrative.description: Slay the Spire is a roguelike deckbuilder where players route through procedural acts, build a synergistic deck, and defeat bosses with limited energy each turn.
